name: NOXXON PH.CONF.IPO EO-,01
summary: NOXXON PH.CONF.IPO EO-,01 is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing innovative cancer therapies by neutralizing the tumor microenvironment. Their lead product candidate, NOX-A12, is a CXCL12 inhibitor being developed for various cancer indications. Noxxon Pharma is headquartered in Berlin, Germany.
